top_signals.title: Japan’s megabanks post record profits, but analysts warn growth may slow as risks mount
top_signals.summary: Japan's largest lenders may face some challenges to keep profit levels at record highs, amid higher credit costs and current geopolitical risks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
